texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Overview:
texts.text: Overview:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp has: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6) Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents
texts.text: Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp has: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6) Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.
texts.text: All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All quoted rates are NETT and are non-commissionable.
texts.text: All quoted rates are NETT and are non-commissionable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All EXTRA services are quoted on NETT basis.
texts.text: All EXTRA services are quoted on NETT basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.
texts.text: Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.
texts.text: Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Single Room policy -We allow a maximum of TWO Single rooms per booking.
texts.text: Single Room policy -We allow a maximum of TWO Single rooms per booking.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy:
texts.text: Child Policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child rate is applicable to children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.
texts.text: Child rate is applicable to children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).
texts.text: Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children staying in their own room pay 75% of the room rate.
texts.text: Children staying in their own room pay 75% of the room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Note:
texts.text: Note:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees are not included on the room rates quoted.
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees are not included on the room rates quoted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees are subject to change by the authorities without prior notice.
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees are subject to change by the authorities without prior notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees quoted are valid for 24 hours.
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees quoted are valid for 24 hours.

table_cells.text: CONFIRMATION ANDCANCELLATION POLICY • Block bookings MUST be confirmed a minimum of 60 days in peak season, and 30 days prior to arrival for the rest of year. • A non-refundable 30% deposit of the total invoice is required upon confirmation of the booking. • 100% payment of the total Invoice is required 45 days prior to the date of arrival for all the seasons. • Cancelation 61+ days, prior to arrival - no cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 46-60 days, prior to arrival - 25% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 22-45 days, prior to arrival - 50% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 72 hrs - 21 days, prior to arrival - 75% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation less than 72 hours, or no-show - 100% cancellation fee charged.

CONTRACTTERMSAND CONDITIONS • This agreement is valid for the year 2024 and must be renewed annually. • These rates are confidential and cannot be made available to any 3rd party through internet sites, e-mail, or any form of publishing. • A tour leader of a group pays 50% of the contracted rates. • Travel Agents pay 30% of the contracted rates, unless invited, or agreed with the Management of Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp - NOTavailable during Peak Season. • Check in on arrival date is from 12 pm (noon), • Check-out is at 10:00 am. • Should the government alter rates, the camp reserves the right to negotiate the rates with contracted agents. • The hotel reserves the right of admission, and the rooms are subject to availability. • Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner, and walking safari are weather- permitting. • Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp does NOT allow pets in, or on the premise.

grid.text: CONFIRMATION ANDCANCELLATION POLICY • Block bookings MUST be confirmed a minimum of 60 days in peak season, and 30 days prior to arrival for the rest of year. • A non-refundable 30% deposit of the total invoice is required upon confirmation of the booking. • 100% payment of the total Invoice is required 45 days prior to the date of arrival for all the seasons. • Cancelation 61+ days, prior to arrival - no cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 46-60 days, prior to arrival - 25% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 22-45 days, prior to arrival - 50% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 72 hrs - 21 days, prior to arrival - 75% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation less than 72 hours, or no-show - 100% cancellation fee charged.

CONTRACTTERMSAND CONDITIONS • This agreement is valid for the year 2024 and must be renewed annually. • These rates are confidential and cannot be made available to any 3rd party through internet sites, e-mail, or any form of publishing. • A tour leader of a group pays 50% of the contracted rates. • Travel Agents pay 30% of the contracted rates, unless invited, or agreed with the Management of Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp - NOTavailable during Peak Season. • Check in on arrival date is from 12 pm (noon), • Check-out is at 10:00 am. • Should the government alter rates, the camp reserves the right to negotiate the rates with contracted agents. • The hotel reserves the right of admission, and the rooms are subject to availability. • Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner, and walking safari are weather- permitting. • Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp does NOT allow pets in, or on the premise.
